overview: A non-surgical, opioid-free clinic specializing in regenerative therapies for pain, injury, and performance. Services include joint injections, stem cell treatments, aesthetic procedures, and wellness support.
highlights: Bone marrow aspiration and stem cell injection treatments
Ultrasound-guided joint injections and nerve blocks
PRP facials, microneedling, and hair restoration
targetAudience: Active individuals, athletes, and those seeking non-surgical pain relief and regenerative wellness treatments.
